name: Rendon Apex Tracker
oracle_text:
Trample
Whenever ~ deals combat damage to a player, look at the top three cards of your library. You may put a creature card from among them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.
flavor_text: "The megadungeon swallows everything. The wilderness just bites."
art_prompt: A lean, weathered human scout in earth-toned leather armor crouches mid-stride through dense wilderness, one hand gripping a wooden spear. Scarred face and alert eyes scan the overgrown path ahead. Tangled vines and gnarled trees frame the figure against a shadowed forest backdrop.. Stylized digital illustration, wide naturalist composition, rich earth tones with dappled light, layered depth, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
design_notes: A solid green uncommon beater at CMC 4. A 4/3 trample for 4 is a fair statline (P+T = 7 = CMC+3), and the combat damage trigger provides card selection that rewards connecting in combat — a green-appropriate 'Impulse for creatures' effect. Trample helps ensure the trigger connects, giving the two abilities natural synergy. The creature-filtering trigger is distinct from salvage (which finds artifacts) and instead supports green's creature-centric gameplan, giving the set's green decks a way to find their threats. The trigger is conditional on combat damage, keeping it from being free value.
